diagnostics.message: A required route waypoint is omitted in the translated text.
An unauthorized destination was added to the text variant.
Target audience scope is contracted or narrowed in generated output.
Target destination was altered or misstated.
Generated text injected an unauthorized delay/waiting instruction.
Action directive has been negated or inverted.
Generated text contains an unauthorized closure claim.
Generated text contains unauthorized wait time or numerical claims.
Validity window clause has been omitted or misstated.
Authoritative GIR details conflict with active guidance.
Critical fallback parsing or template configurations failed.
